category_title: Disruptive and ideologically oppositional student in a teacher education course
scenario_title: Post-exam grade dispute and boundary testing
minimal_context: The student is taking the final exam in person and subsequently communicating with the lecturer via email regarding her final grade.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Hello Shelli, here is the final exam. Please take your seat and begin.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Smiles) You were right. If one does not come to the course he cannot pass the exam.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please focus on completing the test now.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: [Email] Hello Shelli, your final exam has been graded. Your score is 73.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: [Email] I do not understand why I got such a low grade. I want to sit and read the exam with you.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Hello Shelli, here is the final exam. Please take your seat and begin.

STUDENT: (Smiles) You were right. If one does not come to the course he cannot pass the exam.

TUTOR: Please focus on completing the test now.

STUDENT: (Takes the exam)

TUTOR: [Email] Hello Shelli, your final exam has been graded. Your score is 73.

STUDENT: [Email] I do not understand why I got such a low grade. I want to sit and read the exam with you.

task.content: Completing the final exam and communicating via email regarding the resulting grade (73).

context.time_context: On the day of the exam and subsequent email

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Wrote me an e-mail saying that she did not understand why she 'got such a low grade' and that she wanted to sit and read the exam with me.
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Shelli did not interpret my attitude properly

behavior_patterns.condition: On the day of the exam
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: She smiled at me saying: 'you were right. If one does not come to the course he cannot pass the exam'.
related_quotes: you were right. If one does not come to the course he cannot pass the exam
